name: player_season min/max ranking range year_offset take the window MIN/MAX (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with 2024 (min 5, max 20) and 2025 (min 2, max 30) rankings, then run player_season_min_ranking + player_season_max_ranking with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. min_rank must equal the window MIN (2) and max_rank the window MAX (30) -- proving ranks reduce with MIN/MAX, never SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT MIN(player_rankings_index.min) FROM player_rankings_index WHERE player_rankings_index.pid = player.pid AND player_rankings_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_rankings_index.source_id IN ('FANTASYPROS') AND player_rankings_index.ranking_type IN ('PPR_REDRAFT')) AS "min_rank_0", (SELECT MAX(player_rankings_index.max) FROM player_rankings_index WHERE player_rankings_index.pid = player.pid AND player_rankings_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_rankings_index.source_id IN ('FANTASYPROS') AND player_rankings_index.ranking_type IN ('PPR_REDRAFT')) AS "max_rank_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-RANK-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Rank', 'T.Rank', 'Test Rank', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)

INSERT INTO player_rankings_index (pid, pos, year, min, max, avg, std, overall_rank, position_rank, source_id, ranking_type) VALUES ('TEST-RANK-2000-2000-01-01', 'ZZ', 2024, 5, 20, 12.00, 1.00, 50, 10, 'FANTASYPROS', 'PPR_REDRAFT')

INSERT INTO player_rankings_index (pid, pos, year, min, max, avg, std, overall_rank, position_rank, source_id, ranking_type) VALUES ('TEST-RANK-2000-2000-01-01', 'ZZ', 2025, 2, 30, 15.00, 1.00, 40, 8, 'FANTASYPROS', 'PPR_REDRAFT')
